Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 415}I'm not fond of animals, it's true, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 415}After seeing my son get that serious about it, I felt like I should give it a chance anyway.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 415}I wish I would've made that decision earlier...[n]{f 1 1}
